Name: FMovieSceneEvaluationTemplate
Description: Template that is used for efficient runtime evaluation of a movie scene sequence. Potentially serialized into the asset.

Variables.Name: Tracks
Variables.Description: Map of evaluation tracks from identifier to track

Variables.Name: EvaluationField
Variables.Description: Evaluation field for efficient runtime evaluation

Variables.Name: Hierarchy
Variables.Description: Map of all sequences found in this template (recursively)

Variables.Name: bHasLegacyTrackInstances
Variables.Description: When set, this template contains legacy track instances that require the initialization of a legacy sequence instance

Variables.Name: bKeepStaleTracks
Variables.Description: Primarily used in editor to keep stale tracks around during template regeneration to ensure we can call OnEndEvaluation on them.
